html:
“Makes the wearer friendly to Beefalo in heat.”

-

The Beefalo Hat is a Hat Item found in the Clothing Filter and Winter Items Filter. It requires 8 Beefalo Wool and a Beefalo Horn to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 50% of its durability.

It increase the time a character can be without a heat source during the Winter before Freezing. It has 240 Winter Insulation.

Wearing a Beefalo Hat will also cause Beefalo to regard the player with neutral behavior during mating season. If the parent of a Baby Beefalo is killed, and the player is wearing a Beefalo Hat, the baby may start to follow the player provided the player does not already have a follower.

The Beefalo Hat provides 20% Wetness Resistance during Rain.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Klaus Cap skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from December 12, 2019 to January 23, 2020. On December 16, 2021, this skin was made available in the [accounts.klei.com/account/rewards Klei Rewards] shop for 1,200 Klei Points.
  • The Timeless Pig King Hat skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together during the official Year of the Pig King event in 2019. As of February 11, 2021, the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei Points.
Woven - Elegant
Fantasmical Collection
Fantasmical Fur Hat
Look the part of a horned creature of legend.
See ingame
Loyal
Winter Collection
Klaus Cap
A frightfully festive cap.
See ingame
Timeless / Loyal
Year of the Pig King Collection
Pig King Hat
The lingering Pig King smell is actually quite pleasant.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Mystic Collection
Mystic Nomad Hat
Roam with the herd.

Tips

  • When the player is roaming around Beefalos or shaving them at night during mating season, it's advised to wear this hat to keep from being attacked.
  • Players should take off the Hat when next to a fire (or replace it with a sanity-boosting hat) as the item's durability will go down if kept on, and the fire alone is enough to keep the character warm.

Trivia

  • This item used to increase the player's Sanity per minute by a slight amount of points. 
  • The previous crafting description ("And you thought they smelled bad on the outside") was a reference to Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back, when Han Solo cuts open a Tauntaun to keep Luke Skywalker warm, he says, "And I thought they smelled bad on the outside!".
  • Despite having two horns on it, the hat only takes one Beefalo Horn to craft.

-
The Beefalo Hat is a Hat Item found in the Clothing Filter and Winter Items Filter. It requires 8 Beefalo Wool and a Beefalo Horn to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 50% of its durability.
It increase the time a character can be without a heat source during the Winter before Freezing. It has 240 Winter Insulation.
Wearing a Beefalo Hat will also cause Beefalo to regard the player with neutral behavior during mating season. If the parent of a Baby Beefalo is killed, and the player is wearing a Beefalo Hat, the baby may start to follow the player provided the player does not already have a follower.
The Beefalo Hat provides 20% Wetness Resistance during Rain.
Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
The Loyal Klaus Cap skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from December 12, 2019 to January 23, 2020. On December 16, 2021, this skin was made available in the [accounts.klei.com/account/rewards Klei Rewards] shop for 1,200 Klei Points.
The Timeless Pig King Hat skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together during the official Year of the Pig King event in 2019. As of February 11, 2021, the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei Points.

Tips[edit | edit source]
When the player is roaming around Beefalos or shaving them at night during mating season, it's advised to wear this hat to keep from being attacked.
Players should take off the Hat when next to a fire (or replace it with a sanity-boosting hat) as the item's durability will go down if kept on, and the fire alone is enough to keep the character warm.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
This item used to increase the player's Sanity per minute by a slight amount of points.
The previous crafting description ("And you thought they smelled bad on the outside") was a reference to Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back, when Han Solo cuts open a Tauntaun to keep Luke Skywalker warm, he says, "And I thought they smelled bad on the outside!".
Despite having two horns on it, the hat only takes one Beefalo Horn to craft.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Bò Lai là một Vật phẩm Mũ được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Quần áo và Bộ lọc Vật phẩm Mùa đông. Nó cần 8 Lông Bò Lai và một Sừng Bò Lai để chế tạo, và một Máy Khoa Học để tạo nguyên mẫu. Bộ May vá sửa chữa 50% độ bền của nó.

Smell included.}} {{Quotes |wilson = That's a case of hat-hair waiting to happen. |willow = I've taken his hair and put it on my own! |wolfgang = Is good hat! |wendy = To cover one’s head. |wx78 = THERE ARE TRACES OF FECAL MATTER EMBEDDED IN THE FIBERS |wickerbottom = This hat is hideous. |woodie = Now I'm the king of the beefalo! |maxwell = How unfashionable. |wigfrid = This is göing tö löök gööd ön me, I can tell. |webber = We'll blend in perfectly. |warly = Fits perfectly. |wormwood = Warm |winona = Seem secretive. |wortox = Horn replacements. |wurt = Bigger horns!! |walter = It sure smells like beefalo... |wanda = I kind of imagined a fur hat would feel fancier. |choose = woodie}} {{Scrapbook Info|Makes the wearer friendly to Beefalo in heat.}} The '''Beefalo Hat''' is a [[:Category:Hats|Hat]] [[Item]] found in the [[Clothing Filter]] and [[Winter Items Filter]]. It requires 8 [[Beefalo Wool]] and a [[Beefalo Horn]] to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. The [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 50% of its durability. It increase the time a [[character]] can be without a heat source during the [[Winter]] before [[Freezing]]. It has 240 [[Freezing#Mechanics|Winter Insulation]]. Wearing a Beefalo Hat will also cause [[Beefalo]] to regard the player with neutral behavior during mating season. If the parent of a [[Baby Beefalo]] is killed, and the player is wearing a Beefalo Hat, the baby may start to follow the player provided the player does not already have a follower. The Beefalo Hat provides 20% [[Wetness/DST|Wetness Resistance]] during [[Rain]]. __NOTOC__ == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Head_items|Belongings}} * The '''Loyal Klaus Cap''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from December 12, 2019 to January 23, 2020. On December 16, 2021, this skin was made available in the [accounts.klei.com/account/rewards Klei Rewards] shop for 1,200 Klei Points. * The '''Timeless Pig King Hat''' skin was originally awarded for playing ''Don't Starve Together'' during the official [[Year of the Pig King]] event in 2019. As of February 11, 2021, the '''Loyal''' version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei Points.
